title: Test `00906_low_cardinality_cache` is flaky
description:
https://play.clickhouse.com/play?user=play&run=1#
Failes due to timeout:
```
2025-11-21 16:17:35 [4d21e489bc1a] 2025.11.21 06:17:33.907909 [ 852156 ] {4b2dced1-5f2e-4153-8fe3-72f93bdf29aa} <Error> executeQuery: Code: 160. DB::Exception: Estimated query execution time (607.94226 seconds) is too long. Maximum: 600. Estimated rows to process: 100000000 (49610764 read in 301.60480 seconds): While executing NumbersRange. (TOO_SLOW) (version 25.11.1.580) (from [::1]:60582) (comment: 00906_low_cardinality_cache.sql-test_qzazfy8y) (query 4, line 6) (in query: insert into lc_00906 select '0123456789' from numbers(100000000);), Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE lc_00906 (id INTEGER, value VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO lc_00906 SELECT number, '0123456789' FROM range(100000000);
CREATE TABLE lc_test (id INTEGER, data INTEGER);
INSERT INTO lc_test SELECT number, CASE WHEN number % 2 = 0 THEN number ELSE NULL END FROM range(100);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lc_test WHERE data IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Timeout during execution of large number insert query
